subcodes.first_line: O 'Andalib! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The servant in attendance hath indeed recited thy verses and thy prose in praise of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عندلیب علیک بهائی و عنایتی قد انشد العبد الحاضر نظمک و نثرک فی ثناء الله
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @mystical themes, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
